title: Senior Financial Analyst - Muthoot Finance Digital Technologies - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Muthoot Finance Digital Technologies - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Muthoot Finance Digital Technologies in Ludhiana is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Muthoot Finance Digital Technologies:
Muthoot Finance Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Muthoot Finance Digital Technologies!
